top_signals.title: ‘AI Agents Without Context Are Just Guessing Faster’
top_signals.summary:
The decision intelligence CEO joined FreightWaves CEO Craig Fuller on FW Today to discuss how project44 is embedding AI agents to solve data quality gaps, automate carrier follow-up, and deliver measurable supply chain outcomes for shippers and LSPs

The post ‘AI Agents Without Context Are Just Guessing Faster’ appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
